chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5843 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "اَلصَّمْتُ كَنْزٌ وَافِرٌ وَ زَيْنُ اَلْحَلِيمِ وَ سِتْرُ اَلْجَاهِلِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5843 - Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), said:
"Silence is a vast treasure, the adornment of the wise, and a covering for the ignorant."
